---
id: get-schema-body
title: "Get raw JSON Schema document by product type / asset class / subtype"
description: "Returns the verbatim JSON Schema document for the requested triple. The schema version is available in the X-Schema-Version and ETag response headers."
sidebar_label: "Get raw JSON Schema document by product type / asset class / subtype"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get raw JSON Schema document by product type / asset class / subtype"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/config/schemas/{productType}/{assetClass}/{subtype}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the verbatim JSON Schema document for the requested triple. The schema version is available in the X-Schema-Version and ETag response headers.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./get-schema-body.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-schema-body.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
